sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check ALL objects more carefully
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("All objects with children:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['children']:
        rows = [pt[0] for pt in n['boundary']]
        cols = [pt[1] for pt in n['boundary']]
        center = (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))
        print(f"  {n['color']}: center~{center}, pixels={n['pixels']}, children={n['children']}")
# Check if W object still exists
w_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W']
print(f"\nWhite nodes: {len(w_nodes)}")
for n in w_nodes:
    print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
